mapper.insert: insert into LSMD_T ( LSMD_T_ID, LSMD001, LSMD002, LSMD003, LSMD004, LSMD005, LSMD006, LSMD007, LSMD008, LSMD010, LSMD013, LSMD014, LSMD015, LSMD019, LSMD024, LSMD025, LSMD026, LSMD027, LSMD028, LSMD029, LSMD030, LSMD031, LSMD033, LSMD036, LSMD037, LSMD038,LSMD039, LSMD042, LSMD045, LSMD046, LSMD047, LSMD053, LSMD054, LSMD055, LSMD058, LSMD081,LSMD082, LSMD083, LSMD084, LSMD085, LSMD086, LSMD906, LSMD907, LSMDCRTDT, LSMDCRTID, LSMDENT, LSMDMODDT, LSMDMODID, LSMDOWNDP, LSMDOWNID, LSMDSITE, LSMDSTUS ) values ( #{lsmdTId}, #{lsmd001}, #{lsmd002}, #{lsmd003}, #{lsmd004}, #{lsmd005}, #{lsmd006}, #{lsmd007}, #{lsmd008}, #{lsmd010}, #{lsmd013}, #{lsmd014}, #{lsmd015}, #{lsmd019}, #{lsmd024}, #{lsmd025}, #{lsmd026}, #{lsmd027}, #{lsmd028}, #{lsmd029}, #{lsmd030}, #{lsmd031}, #{lsmd033},#{lsmd036}, #{lsmd037}, #{lsmd038}, #{lsmd039}, #{lsmd042}, #{lsmd045}, #{lsmd046}, #{lsmd047}, #{lsmd053}, #{lsmd054}, #{lsmd055}, #{lsmd058}, #{lsmd081},#{lsmd082}, #{lsmd083}, #{lsmd084}, #{lsmd085}, #{lsmd086}, #{lsmd906}, #{lsmd907}, #{lsmdcrtdt}, #{lsmdcrtid}, #{lsmdent}, #{lsmdmoddt}, #{lsmdmodid}, #{lsmdowndp}, #{lsmdownid}, #{lsmdsite}, #{lsmdstus} )
mapper.select:
SELECT TOP 30 ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, ITEM.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, ITEM.ITEM_SPECIFICATION AS itemSpec, ISNULL(ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE,'') AS productCode, '' AS lotNo , WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE AS warehouseStorage, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE as warehouseNo, WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_NAME as warehouseName, CAST (SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.INVENTORY_QTY) AS REAL) AS stockQty , UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS unit, ISNULL(UNIT_01.UNIT_NAME,'') AS unitName, SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.SECOND_QTY) AS referenceQty, ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE,'') AS referenceUnitNo, ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME,'') AS referenceUnitName FROM ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN AS ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID INNER JOIN ITEM ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID INNER JOIN UNIT ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID= UNIT.UNIT_ID INNER JOIN PLANT ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.Owner_Org_ROid =PLANT.PLANT_ID LEFT join ITEM_FEATURE on ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT AS UNIT_01 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_01.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT AS UNIT_02 ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN dbo.ITEM_LOT ON ITEM_LOT.ITEM_LOT_ID = ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT JOIN BIN ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID = BIN.BIN_ID WHERE PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1'
AND ITEM.ITEM_CODE like concat('%',#{itemCode},'%')
and ITEM.ITEM_NAME like concat('%',#{itemName},'%')
and ITEM.ITEM_SPECIFICATION like concat('%',#{itemSpec},'%')
and WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouse}
GROUP BY ITEM.ITEM_CODE, ITEM.ITEM_NAME, ITEM.ITEM_SPECIFICATION, ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE ,WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE ,UNIT.UNIT_NAME,WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_NAME ,UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE,UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME,UNIT_01.UNIT_NAME HAVING SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.INVENTORY_QTY)<>0 order by ITEM.ITEM_CODE,ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE,WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE,ITEM.ITEM_NAME,ITEM.ITEM_SPECIFICATION -- order by ITEM.ITEM_CODE asc

SELECT DISTINCT TOP 100 A.DOC_NO AS docNo, A.DOC_DATE AS DOC_DATE, CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS createDate, ISNULL(C.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, ' ') AS departmentNo, ISNULL(C.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, ' ') AS departmentName, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_CODE, ' ') AS employeeNo, ISNULL(D.EMPLOYEE_NAME, ' ') AS employeeName, '' AS customerNo, '' AS customerName, '' AS supplierNo, '' AS supplierName FROM TRANSACTION_DOC AS A INNER JOIN PLANT ON PLANT.PLANT_ID = A.Owner_Org_ROid INNER JOIN TRANSACTION_DOC_D AS B ON B.TRANSACTION_DOC_ID = A.TRANSACTION_DOC_ID LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS C ON C.ADMIN_UNIT_ID = A.Owner_Dept LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE AS D ON D.EMPLOYEE_ID = A.Owner_Emp INNER JOIN ITEM ON B.ITEM_ID = ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID WHERE PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' and A.ApproveStatus = 'N' and A.STOCK_ACTION = 1 and A.CATEGORY = '11'
and A.DOC_NO like concat('%',#{docNo},'%')
AND CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) > #{startDate}
AND CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) < #{endDate}
and (D.EMPLOYEE_CODE like concat('%',#{employee},'%') or D.EMPLOYEE_NAME like concat('%',#{employee},'%'))
and (C.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE like concat('%',#{department},'%') or C.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME like concat('%',#{department},'%'))
ORDER BY A.DOC_DATE DESC, A.DOC_NO ASC

SELECT TRANSACTION_DOC.DOC_NO AS docNo , CAST(TRANSACTION_DOC.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS docDate , ISNULL(ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, ' ') AS departmentNo , ISNULL(ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, ' ') AS departmentName , ISNULL(EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE, ' ') AS employeeNo , ISNULL(EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME, ' ') AS employeeName , ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS itemName , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION AS itemSpec , ISNULL(ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE, ' ') AS productCode , '' AS stockCode , UNIT.UNIT_CODE AS unitCode , 0 AS stockQty , SUM(TRANSACTION_DOC_D.BUSINESS_QTY) AS applyQty , 0 AS scanSumQty , '' AS customerNo , '' AS customerName , '' AS supplierNo , '' AS supplierName , ISNULL(WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE, N' ') AS warehouseNo , ISNULL(BIN.BIN_CODE, N' ') AS storageSpacesNo , ISNULL(ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE, N' ') AS lotNo , UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName , dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, SUM(TRANSACTION_DOC_D.BUSINESS_QTY), ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0) AS referenceQty , '' AS valuationUnitNo , '' AS valuationUnitName , 0 AS valuationQty , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep , 0 keep , 1 rate FROM TRANSACTION_DOC AS TRANSACTION_DOC INNER JOIN TRANSACTION_DOC_D AS TRANSACTION_DOC_D ON TRANSACTION_DOC_D.TRANSACTION_DOC_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC.TRANSACTION_DOC_ID INNER JOIN PLANT AS PLANT ON PLANT.PLANT_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT OUTER JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS ADMIN_UNIT ON ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC.Owner_Dept LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE AS EMPLOYEE ON EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC.Owner_Emp INNER JOIN ITEM AS ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_FEATURE AS ITEM_FEATURE ON ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE AS WAREHOUSE ON WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC_D.WAREHOUSE_ID INNER JOIN UNIT AS UNIT ON UNIT.UNIT_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC_D.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN BIN ON TRANSACTION_DOC_D.BIN_ID = BIN.BIN_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_LOT ON TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_LOT_ID = ITEM_LOT.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT AS UNIT_02 ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_04.UNIT_ID WHERE TRANSACTION_DOC.DOC_NO = #{docNo} AND TRANSACTION_DOC.ApproveStatus = 'N' GROUP BY TRANSACTION_DOC.DOC_NO, TRANSACTION_DOC.DOC_DATE , ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE , ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME , EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE , EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME , ITEM.ITEM_CODE , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE , ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , UNIT.UNIT_CODE , WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE , BIN.BIN_CODE , ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID

SELECT TRANSACTION_DOC.DOC_NO AS docNo , CAST(TRANSACTION_DOC.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS docDate , ISNULL(ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, ' ') AS departmentNo , ISNULL(ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, ' ') AS departmentName , ISNULL(EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE, ' ') AS employeeNo , ISNULL(EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME, ' ') AS employeeName , ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS itemName , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION AS itemSpec , ISNULL(ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE, ' ') AS productCode , '' AS stockCode , UNIT.UNIT_CODE AS unitCode , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.applyQty AS applyQty , 0 AS scanSumQty , CAST(sum(ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY, 0)) as real ) AS stockQty , sum(ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.TOTAL_SECOND_QTY, 0)) AS referenceStockQty , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceStockUnitNo , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceStockUnitName , '' AS customerNo , '' AS customerName , '' AS supplierNo , '' AS supplierName , ISNULL(WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE, N' ') AS warehouseNo , ISNULL(BIN.BIN_CODE, N' ') AS storageSpacesNo , ISNULL(ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE, N' ') AS lotNo , UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName , dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, TRANSACTION_DOC_D.applyQty, ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0) AS referenceQty , '' AS valuationUnitNo , '' AS valuationUnitName , 0 AS valuationQty , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep , CASE WHEN dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) = '0' THEN 1 ELSE dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) END as rate , ISNULL(UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT, 0) as keep FROM TRANSACTION_DOC AS TRANSACTION_DOC INNER JOIN (select TRANSACTION_DOC_D.TRANSACTION_DOC_ID , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_ID , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.WAREHOUSE_ID , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.BIN_ID , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_LOT_ID , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION
, TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , SUM(TRANSACTION_DOC_D.BUSINESS_QTY) AS applyQty from TRANSACTION_DOC_D group by TRANSACTION_DOC_D.TRANSACTION_DOC_ID , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_ID , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.WAREHOUSE_ID , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.BIN_ID , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_LOT_ID , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION) AS TRANSACTION_DOC_D ON TRANSACTION_DOC_D.TRANSACTION_DOC_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC.TRANSACTION_DOC_ID INNER JOIN PLANT AS PLANT ON PLANT.PLANT_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT OUTER JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS ADMIN_UNIT ON ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC.Owner_Dept LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE AS EMPLOYEE ON EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC.Owner_Emp INNER JOIN ITEM AS ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_FEATURE AS ITEM_FEATURE ON ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE AS WAREHOUSE ON WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC_D.WAREHOUSE_ID INNER JOIN UNIT AS UNIT ON UNIT.UNIT_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC_D.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID , SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.INVENTORY_QTY) AS TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY , SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.SECOND_QTY) AS TOTAL_SECOND_QTY FROM ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN AS ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN INNER JOIN PLANT ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_RTK = 'OTHER' AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_ROid = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' AND PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' GROUP BY ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID) AS ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_ID AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID AND (ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC_D.WAREHOUSE_ID OR TRANSACTION_DOC_D.WAREHOUSE_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND (ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC_D.BIN_ID OR TRANSACTION_DOC_D.BIN_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND (ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID = TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_LOT_ID or TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_LOT_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') LEFT OUTER JOIN BIN ON TRANSACTION_DOC_D.BIN_ID = BIN.BIN_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_LOT ON TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_LOT_ID = ITEM_LOT.ITEM_LOT_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT AS UNIT_02 ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN UNIT AS UNIT_04 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_04.UNIT_ID WHERE TRANSACTION_DOC.DOC_NO = #{docNo} AND TRANSACTION_DOC.ApproveStatus = 'N'
GROUP BY TRANSACTION_DOC.DOC_NO, TRANSACTION_DOC.DOC_DATE, ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE , ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME , EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE, EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME, ITEM.ITEM_CODE, TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION, ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE, UNIT.UNIT_CODE , TRANSACTION_DOC_D.applyQty , WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE , BIN.BIN_CODE , ITEM_LOT.LOT_CODE , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID , UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT UNION ALL
SELECT STOCK_REQUISITION.DOC_NO AS docNo , CAST(STOCK_REQUISITION.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS docDate , ISNULL(ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE, ' ') AS departmentNo , ISNULL(ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME, ' ') AS departmentName , ISNULL(EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE, ' ') AS employeeNo , ISNULL(EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME, ' ') AS employeeName , ITEM.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS itemName , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION AS itemSpec , ISNULL(ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE, ' ') AS productCode , '' AS stockCode , UNIT.UNIT_CODE AS unitCode , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.applyQty AS applyQty , 0 AS scanSumQty , sum(ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY, 0)) AS stockQty , sum(ISNULL(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.TOTAL_SECOND_QTY, 0)) AS referenceStockQty , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceStockUnitNo , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceStockUnitName , '' AS customerNo , '' AS customerName , '' AS supplierNo , '' AS supplierName , ISNULL(WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE, N' ') AS warehouseNo , N' ' AS storageSpacesNo , N' ' AS lotNo , UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitName , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName , dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, STOCK_REQUISITION_D.applyQty, ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0) AS referenceQty , '' AS valuationUnitNo , '' AS valuationUnitName , 0 AS valuationQty , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep , CASE WHEN dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) = '0' THEN 1 ELSE dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) END as rate , ISNULL(UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT, 0) as keep FROM STOCK_REQUISITION AS STOCK_REQUISITION INNER JOIN (select STOCK_REQUISITION_D.STOCK_REQUISITION_ID , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.ITEM_ID , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.WAREHOUSE_ID , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.[CLOSE] , SUM(STOCK_REQUISITION_D.BUSINESS_QTY - RELEASE_BUSINESS_QTY) AS applyQty from STOCK_REQUISITION_D WHERE STOCK_REQUISITION_D.[CLOSE] = '0' AND STOCK_REQUISITION_D.BUSINESS_QTY - RELEASE_BUSINESS_QTY > 0 group by STOCK_REQUISITION_D.STOCK_REQUISITION_ID , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.ITEM_ID , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.WAREHOUSE_ID , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.[CLOSE]) AS STOCK_REQUISITION_D ON STOCK_REQUISITION_D.STOCK_REQUISITION_ID = STOCK_REQUISITION.STOCK_REQUISITION_ID INNER JOIN PLANT AS PLANT ON PLANT.PLANT_ID = STOCK_REQUISITION.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT OUTER JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS ADMIN_UNIT ON ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_ID = STOCK_REQUISITION.Owner_Dept LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE AS EMPLOYEE ON EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_ID = STOCK_REQUISITION.Owner_Emp INNER JOIN ITEM AS ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = STOCK_REQUISITION_D.ITEM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_FEATURE AS ITEM_FEATURE ON ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = STOCK_REQUISITION_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE AS WAREHOUSE ON WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID = STOCK_REQUISITION_D.WAREHOUSE_ID INNER JOIN UNIT AS UNIT ON UNIT.UNIT_ID = STOCK_REQUISITION_D.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID , SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.INVENTORY_QTY) AS TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY , SUM(ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.SECOND_QTY) AS TOTAL_SECOND_QTY FROM ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN AS ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN INNER JOIN PLANT ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.Owner_Org_ROid = PLANT.PLANT_ID INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_RTK = 'OTHER' AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_ROid = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' AND PLANT.PLANT_CODE = '1' GROUP BY ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BIN_ID , ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_LOT_ID) AS ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN ON ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_ID = STOCK_REQUISITION_D.ITEM_ID AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.ITEM_FEATURE_ID = STOCK_REQUISITION_D.ITEM_FEATURE_ID AND (ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.WAREHOUSE_ID = STOCK_REQUISITION_D.WAREHOUSE_ID OR STOCK_REQUISITION_D.WAREHOUSE_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') LEFT JOIN UNIT AS UNIT_02 ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.UNIT_ID LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_04.UNIT_ID WHERE STOCK_REQUISITION.DOC_NO = #{docNo} AND STOCK_REQUISITION.ApproveStatus = 'Y' GROUP BY STOCK_REQUISITION.DOC_NO, STOCK_REQUISITION.DOC_DATE, ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE , ADMIN_UNIT.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME , EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE, EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME, ITEM.ITEM_CODE, STOCK_REQUISITION_D.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION, ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE, UNIT.UNIT_CODE , STOCK_REQUISITION_D.applyQty , WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID , UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT

SELECT [TRANSFER_DOC].[DOC_NO] AS docNo , CAST([TRANSFER_DOC].[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS docDate , ISNULL([ADMIN_UNIT].[ADMIN_UNIT_CODE], ' ') AS departmentNo , ISNULL([ADMIN_UNIT].[ADMIN_UNIT_NAME], ' ') AS departmentName , ISNULL([EMPLOYEE].[EMPLOYEE_CODE], ' ') AS employeeNo , ISNULL([EMPLOYEE].[EMPLOYEE_NAME], ' ') AS employeeName , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS itemNo , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS itemName , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS itemSpec , ISNULL(ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE, ' ') AS productCode , '' AS stockCode , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[applyQty] AS [applyQty] , SUM(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY], 0)) AS [stockQty] , sum(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].TOTAL_SECOND_QTY, 0)) AS referenceStockQty , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceStockUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceStockUnitName , --参考单位名称 0 AS [scanSumQty] , '' AS customerNo , '' AS customerName , '' AS supplierNo , '' AS supplierName , ISNULL([WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE], N' ') AS warehouseNo , ISNULL([FROMBIN].[BIN_CODE], N' ') AS storageSpacesNo , ISNULL([ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE], N' ') AS lotNo , UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS unitNo --交易单位名称 , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName--参考单位名称 , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[applyQty], ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0) AS referenceQty --参考单位数量 , '' AS valuationUnitNo --计价单位编码 , '' AS valuationUnitName --计价单位名称 , 0 AS valuationQty --计价单位数量 , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo --库存单位编码 , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName --库存单位名称 , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep --库存单位小数位数 , CASE WHEN dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) = '0' THEN 1 ELSE dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) END AS rate , ISNULL(UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT, 0) AS [keep] , PLANT.PLANT_CODE AS inSite , ISNULL([WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE], N' ') as fromWarehouseCode , ISNULL([WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_NAME], N' ') as fromWarehouseName , ISNULL([TOWAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE], N' ') as toWarehouseCode , ISNULL([TOWAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_NAME], N' ') as toWarehouseName , ISNULL([FROMBIN].[BIN_CODE], N' ') as fromBinCode , ISNULL([TOBIN].[BIN_CODE], N' ') AS toBinCode FROM [TRANSFER_DOC] AS [TRANSFER_DOC] INNER JOIN (SELECT [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[TRANSFER_DOC_ID] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_ID] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[FROM_WAREHOUSE_ID] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[TO_WAREHOUSE_ID] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[FROM_BIN_ID] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[TO_BIN_ID] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] , SUM([TRANSFER_DOC_D].[BUSINESS_QTY]) AS [applyQty] FROM [TRANSFER_DOC_D] GROUP BY [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[TRANSFER_DOC_ID] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_ID] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[FROM_WAREHOUSE_ID] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[FROM_BIN_ID] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION], [TRANSFER_DOC_D].TO_WAREHOUSE_ID, [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[TO_BIN_ID]) AS [TRANSFER_DOC_D] ON [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[TRANSFER_DOC_ID] = [TRANSFER_DOC].[TRANSFER_DOC_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ADMIN_UNIT] AS [ADMIN_UNIT] ON [ADMIN_UNIT].[ADMIN_UNIT_ID] = [TRANSFER_DOC].[Owner_Dept] LEFT OUTER JOIN [EMPLOYEE] AS [EMPLOYEE] ON [EMPLOYEE].[EMPLOYEE_ID] = [TRANSFER_DOC].[Owner_Emp] INNER JOIN [ITEM] AS [ITEM] ON [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] = [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] AS [WAREHOUSE] ON [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_ID] = [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[FROM_WAREHOUSE_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] AS [TOWAREHOUSE] ON [TOWAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_ID] = [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[TO_WAREHOUSE_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID , SUM([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[INVENTORY_QTY]) AS [TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY] , SUM([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[SECOND_QTY]) AS [TOTAL_SECOND_QTY] FROM [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[Owner_Org_ROid] = [PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_RTK = 'OTHER' AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_ROid = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' AND [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE] = '1' GROUP BY [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID) AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] = [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_ID] AND [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[FROM_WAREHOUSE_ID] OR [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[FROM_WAREHOUSE_ID] = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID = [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[FROM_BIN_ID] OR [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[FROM_BIN_ID] = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID = [TRANSFER_DOC_D].ITEM_LOT_ID OR [TRANSFER_DOC_D].ITEM_LOT_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') INNER JOIN [UNIT] AS [UNIT] ON [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] = [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [BIN] as [FROMBIN] ON [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[FROM_BIN_ID] = [FROMBIN].[BIN_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [BIN] as [TOBIN] ON [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[FROM_BIN_ID] = [TOBIN].[BIN_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_LOT] ON [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_LOT_ID] = [ITEM_LOT].[ITEM_LOT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN UNIT AS UNIT_04 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN PLANT ON PLANT.PLANT_ID = TRANSFER_DOC.TO_PLANT_ID WHERE (( [TRANSFER_DOC].[DOC_NO] = #{docNo}) AND[TRANSFER_DOC].[ApproveStatus] = N'N') GROUP BY [TRANSFER_DOC].[DOC_NO], [TRANSFER_DOC].[DOC_DATE], [ADMIN_UNIT].[ADMIN_UNIT_CODE] , [ADMIN_UNIT].[ADMIN_UNIT_NAME], [EMPLOYEE].[EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMPLOYEE].[EMPLOYEE_NAME], [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] , [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION], [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION], ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE], [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[applyQty], [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE] , [FROMBIN].[BIN_CODE] , [ITEM_LOT].[LOT_CODE] , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID , UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT , PLANT.PLANT_CODE, [TRANSFER_DOC_D].FROM_WAREHOUSE_ID, [TRANSFER_DOC_D].TO_WAREHOUSE_ID, [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[FROM_BIN_ID], [TRANSFER_DOC_D].[TO_BIN_ID], [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_NAME] ,[WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_NAME] , [TOWAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_NAME] , [FROMBIN].[BIN_CODE] , [TOBIN].[BIN_CODE] ,[WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE] , [TOWAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE] UNION ALL
SELECT [TRANSFER_REQUISITION].[DOC_NO] AS docNo , CAST([TRANSFER_REQUISITION].[DOC_DATE] AS NVARCHAR(10)) AS docDate , ISNULL([ADMIN_UNIT].[ADMIN_UNIT_CODE], ' ') AS departmentNo , ISNULL([ADMIN_UNIT].[ADMIN_UNIT_NAME], ' ') AS departmentName , ISNULL([EMPLOYEE].[EMPLOYEE_CODE], ' ') AS employeeNo , ISNULL([EMPLOYEE].[EMPLOYEE_NAME], ' ') AS employeeName , [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] AS itemNo , [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] AS itemName , [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] AS itemSpec , ISNULL(ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE, ' ') AS productCode , '' AS stockCode , [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE] AS [unitNo] , [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[applyQty] AS [applyQty] , SUM(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY], 0)) AS [stockQty] , sum(ISNULL([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].TOTAL_SECOND_QTY, 0)) AS referenceStockQty , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceStockUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceStockUnitName , --参考单位名称 0 AS [scanSumQty] , '' AS customerNo , '' AS customerName , '' AS supplierNo , '' AS supplierName , ISNULL([WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE], N' ') AS warehouseNo , N'' AS storageSpacesNo , N'' AS lotNo , UNIT.UNIT_NAME as unitNo --交易单位名称 , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE, '') AS referenceUnitNo --参考单位编码(第二单位) , ISNULL(UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME, '') AS referenceUnitName--参考单位名称 , dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[applyQty], ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID, 0) AS referenceQty --参考单位数量 , '' AS valuationUnitNo --计价单位编码 , '' AS valuationUnitName --计价单位名称 , 0 AS valuationQty --计价单位数量 , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE AS stockUnitNo --库存单位编码 , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME AS stockUnitName --库存单位名称 , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT AS stockKeep --库存单位小数位数 --,dbo.[UNIT_CONVERT](ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID,UNIT.UNIT_ID,[TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[applyQty] ,ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID,0) AS stockQty --库存数量 , CASE WHEN dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) = '0' THEN 1 ELSE dbo.UNIT_CONVERT(ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID, UNIT.UNIT_ID, 1, ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID, 1) END as rate , ISNULL(UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT, 0) as [keep] , PLANT.PLANT_CODE AS inSite , ISNULL([WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE], N' ') as fromWarehouseCode , N' ' as toWarehouseCode , ISNULL([WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_NAME], N' ') as fromWarehouseName , N' ' as toWarehouseName ,N' ' as fromBinCode ,N' ' AS toBinCode FROM [TRANSFER_REQUISITION] AS [TRANSFER_REQUISITION] INNER JOIN (SELECT [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[TRANSFER_REQUISITION_ID] , [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[ITEM_ID] , [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[FROM_WAREHOUSE_ID] , [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] , [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION]
, SUM([TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[BUSINESS_QTY] - [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].TRANS_OUT_BUSINESS_QTY) AS [applyQty] FROM [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D] WHERE [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[BUSINESS_QTY] - [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].TRANS_OUT_BUSINESS_QTY > 0 GROUP BY [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[TRANSFER_REQUISITION_ID] , [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[ITEM_ID] , [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[FROM_WAREHOUSE_ID] , [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] , [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION] , [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION]) AS [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D] ON [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[TRANSFER_REQUISITION_ID] = [TRANSFER_REQUISITION].[TRANSFER_REQUISITION_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ADMIN_UNIT] AS [ADMIN_UNIT] ON [ADMIN_UNIT].[ADMIN_UNIT_ID] = [TRANSFER_REQUISITION].[Owner_Dept] LEFT OUTER JOIN [EMPLOYEE] AS [EMPLOYEE] ON [EMPLOYEE].[EMPLOYEE_ID] = [TRANSFER_REQUISITION].[Owner_Emp] INNER JOIN [ITEM] AS [ITEM] ON [ITEM].[ITEM_BUSINESS_ID] = [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[ITEM_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [ITEM_FEATURE] AS [ITEM_FEATURE] ON [ITEM_FEATURE].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] AS [WAREHOUSE] ON [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_ID] = [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[FROM_WAREHOUSE_ID] LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID , SUM([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[INVENTORY_QTY]) AS [TOTAL_INVENTORY_QTY] , SUM([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[SECOND_QTY]) AS [TOTAL_SECOND_QTY] FROM [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] INNER JOIN [PLANT] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[Owner_Org_ROid] = [PLANT].[PLANT_ID] INNER JOIN [WAREHOUSE] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_RTK = 'OTHER' AND ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN.BO_ID_ROid = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' AND [PLANT].[PLANT_CODE] = '1' GROUP BY [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].BIN_ID , [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].ITEM_LOT_ID) AS [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN] ON [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_ID] = [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[ITEM_ID] AND [ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] = [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[ITEM_FEATURE_ID] AND ([ITEM_WAREHOUSE_BIN].WAREHOUSE_ID = [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[FROM_WAREHOUSE_ID] OR [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[FROM_WAREHOUSE_ID] = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') Inner join [UNIT] AS [UNIT] ON [UNIT].[UNIT_ID] = [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[BUSINESS_UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN [UNIT] AS UNIT_02 --第二单位(参考单位) ON ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID = UNIT_02.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN dbo.UNIT AS UNIT_04 --库存单位 ON ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID = UNIT_04.[UNIT_ID] LEFT JOIN PLANT ON PLANT.PLANT_ID = TRANSFER_REQUISITION.Owner_Org_ROid WHERE ( ( [TRANSFER_REQUISITION].[DOC_NO] = #{docNo}) AND[TRANSFER_REQUISITION].[ApproveStatus] = N'Y') GROUP BY [TRANSFER_REQUISITION].[DOC_NO], [TRANSFER_REQUISITION].[DOC_DATE], [ADMIN_UNIT].[ADMIN_UNIT_CODE] , [ADMIN_UNIT].[ADMIN_UNIT_NAME], [EMPLOYEE].[EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMPLOYEE].[EMPLOYEE_NAME], [ITEM].[ITEM_CODE] , [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[ITEM_DESCRIPTION], [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[ITEM_SPECIFICATION] , ITEM_FEATURE.ITEM_FEATURE_CODE, [UNIT].[UNIT_CODE], [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].[applyQty] , [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE] , UNIT.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_02.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_02.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.UNIT_CODE , UNIT_04.UNIT_NAME , UNIT_04.DICIMAL_DIGIT , ITEM.SECOND_UNIT_ID , UNIT.UNIT_ID , ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID , ITEM.STOCK_UNIT_ID , UNIT.DICIMAL_DIGIT , PLANT.PLANT_CODE, [TRANSFER_REQUISITION_D].FROM_WAREHOUSE_ID, [WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_NAME] ,[WAREHOUSE].[WAREHOUSE_CODE]

SELECT DISTINCT A.DOC_NO AS docNo,A.DOC_ID AS docId,CAST(A.DOC_DATE AS NVARCHAR(10))AS docDate,P.PLANT_CODE AS fromShjg, TP.PLANT_CODE AS toShjg FROM TRANSFER_DOC AS A LEFT JOIN TRANSFER_DOC_D AS B ON B.TRANSFER_DOC_ID=A.TRANSFER_DOC_ID LEFT JOIN PLANT P ON P.PLANT_ID=A.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN PLANT TP ON TP.PLANT_ID = A.TO_PLANT_ID WHERE A.ApproveStatus='N'

SELECT DISTINCT A.DOC_NO docNo,A.DOC_ID AS docId,B.TRANSFER_DOC_D_ID AS docDId,U.UNIT_CODE unitCode, U.UNIT_NAME unitName, FC.WAREHOUSE_CODE fromWarehouseCode,TC.WAREHOUSE_CODE toWarehouseCode, D.ITEM_CODE itemCode,D.ITEM_NAME itemName,D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION itemSpec, SUM(B.BUSINESS_QTY) planQty,SUM(B.TRANSFERED_BUSINESS_QTY) transferQty,SUM(B.BUSINESS_QTY-B.TRANSFERED_BUSINESS_QTY) untransferQty, Z.UDF021 toBinCode, FP.PLANT_CODE AS fromShjg, TP.PLANT_CODE AS toShjg,B.SequenceNumber xh FROM TRANSFER_DOC AS A LEFT JOIN TRANSFER_DOC_D AS B ON B.TRANSFER_DOC_ID=A.TRANSFER_DOC_ID LEFT JOIN PLANT FP ON FP.PLANT_ID = A.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN PLANT TP ON TP.PLANT_ID = A.TO_PLANT_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM ON B.ITEM_ID=ITEM.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE FC ON B.FROM_WAREHOUSE_ID = FC.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE TC ON B.TO_WAREHOUSE_ID = TC.WAREHOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM D ON D.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID = B.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN ITEM_PLANT Z ON Z.ITEM_ID = D.ITEM_BUSINESS_ID AND TP.PLANT_ID = Z.Owner_Org_ROid LEFT JOIN UNIT U ON D.STOCK_UNIT_ID = U.UNIT_ID WHERE B.BUSINESS_QTY-B.TRANSFERED_BUSINESS_QTY>0 AND A.DOC_NO = #{docNo} GROUP BY A.DOC_NO, A.DOC_ID, B.TRANSFER_DOC_D_ID, U.UNIT_CODE, U.UNIT_NAME, FC.WAREHOUSE_CODE, TC.WAREHOUSE_CODE, D.ITEM_CODE, D.ITEM_NAME, D.ITEM_SPECIFICATION, Z.UDF021, FP.PLANT_CODE, TP.PLANT_CODE, B.SequenceNumber
ORDER BY D.ITEM_CODE
SELECT SUM(qty) FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE barcode = #{barcode} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = #{chatType}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = #{chagType}
mapper.select: SELECT id id, barcode barcode, item_no itemNo, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, qty qty, reference_qty referenceQty, sn_from_warehouse_no snFromWarehouseNo, sn_from_cell_no snFromCellNo, sn_to_warehouse_no snToWarehouseNo, sn_to_cell_no snToCellNo, unit_no unitNo, unit_name unitNmae, chag_type chagType, status_code statusCode, create_by createBy, doc_return_flag docReturnFlag, stock_keep stockKeep, stock_rate stockRate FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE status_code = 0 AND chag_type = #{chagType} AND create_by = #{createBy} AND barcode = #{barcode}
mapper.update: UPDATE bm_barcode_detail SET qty = qty - #{qty} WHERE barcode = #{barcode}
mapper.select: SELECT id, doc_no docNo, sn_from_warehouse_no fromWarehouseCode, sn_from_cell_no fromBinCode, sn_to_warehouse_no toWarehouseCode, sn_to_cell_no toBinCode, item_no itemNo, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec, barcode barcode, qty matchQty, unit_no unitNo, unit_name unitName, chag_type chagType, status_code statusCode, create_by createBy, create_date createDate, doc_org_no fromShjg, org_no toShjg FROM inv_barcode_operation WHERE create_by = #{createBy} AND status_code = 0 AND chag_type = 8

SELECT barcode,item_no itemCode, item_name itemName, item_spec itemSpec,unit_no unitNo, unit_name unitName, qty,sn_warehouse_no warehouseCode, sn_warehouse_name warehouseName,sn_cell_no binCode,remark remark, org_no fromShjg FROM bm_barcode_detail WHERE barcode = #{barCode}
